title: Zero Vector — Persona
description: Captures a user persona: a composite archetype representing a segment of your target audience.

role.description: Their professional role or primary identity

goals.description: What this persona is trying to achieve

frustrations.description: What blocks or annoys this persona in their current workflow

tools_used.description: Software, services, or methods they currently use

quote.description: A representative quote that captures this persona's voice
